transcript.message: Interview session connected. Microphone is ready.
Microphone enabled. You can start speaking.
Interview started. Please introduce yourself and share what drew you to caregiving work.

Hi, I'm CareBot. This interview will take about 12 minutes. I'll ask for short examples from your experience. Please avoid sharing private patient details. Ready? 

Let's get started.
Hi, I'm CareBot. This will take about 12 minutes. Short examples help. Please avoid private patient details. Ready?
Great. Let's get started. Question 1: Have you ever worked as a caregiver? If so, what kinds of patients did you work with and what services did you perform?
I'm not a fishery, but I've helped family here and there. I'm a good learner, so I can figure it out on the spot.
Got it. Thanks for sharing that. Question 2: Imagine you're finding a caregiver for a loved one. What traits or skills would be most important?
I mean someone who gets things done fast and doesn't make a big deal out of small stuff.
Got it. Efficiency and a calm approach are important. Last question: How has your prior work or life experience helped you build the skills to be a good caregiver?
My past job is fund caregiving but work is work. Give me a checklist and I'll take it off.
Thank you for sharing, [Candidate_Name]. We'll review and update you soon. Please leave the meeting by clicking the button below. Take care.
